topic: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among)

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: The book is on the table.
sentences.pronunciation: the book is on the table

sentences.english: The cat is under the table.
sentences.pronunciation: the cat is under the table

sentences.english: We are in the room.
sentences.pronunciation: we are in the room

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: I will come at 5 pm.
sentences.pronunciation: i will come at 5 pm

sentences.english: My birthday is in January.
sentences.pronunciation: my birthday is in january

sentences.english: The meeting is on Monday.
sentences.pronunciation: the meeting is on monday

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: The lamp is over the table.
sentences.pronunciation: the lamp is over the table

sentences.english: This book is between mine and yours.
sentences.hindi: यह किताब मेरी और तुम्हारी के बीच है।
sentences.pronunciation: this book is between mine and yours

sentences.english: This competition is among three teams.
sentences.hindi: यह प्रतियोगिता तीन टीमों के बीच है।
sentences.pronunciation: this competition is among three teams

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: We live in Delhi.
sentences.pronunciation: we live in delhi

sentences.english: He is standing at the door.
sentences.pronunciation: he is standing at the door

sentences.english: The book is on the shelf.
sentences.pronunciation: the book is on the shelf

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: The children are playing in the garden.
sentences.hindi: बच्चे बगीचे में खेल रहे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: the children are playing in the garden

sentences.english: My meeting is at 10 am.
sentences.pronunciation: my meeting is at 10 am

sentences.english: We travel in summer.
sentences.hindi: हम गर्मियों में यात्रा करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we travel in summer

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: His wedding is on Friday.
sentences.pronunciation: his wedding is on friday

sentences.english: The bridge is over the river.
sentences.pronunciation: the bridge is over the river

sentences.english: He is sitting between two friends.
sentences.hindi: वह दो दोस्तों के बीच बैठा है।
sentences.pronunciation: he is sitting between two friends

drills.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: This book is very popular among all students.
sentences.hindi: यह किताब सभी छात्रों के बीच बहुत पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: this book is very popular among all students

sentences.english: I work in the office.
sentences.hindi: मैं ऑफिस में काम करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i work in the office
